title: Mahón-Menorca Cheese Fair
description: Every third weekend of October, Maó becomes the epicentre of Mahón-Menorca PDO cheese with a fair of tastings, wine pairings, showcooking by local chefs, workshops and the now-traditional FormatJazz, which pairs jazz with cheese. 2026 dates to be confirmed in the official Ajuntament de Maó programme.
